h1.visual_description: Bolded sentence or phrase at the beginning of a bulleted list item, serving as a topical header.
h1.example_text: What the sources suggest about the level of research.

h2.visual_description: Standard weight text followed by a colon, used to introduce a list or section of content.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Numbered reference or source list item.
Bulleted discussion point with a bolded thematic lead-in.
Page footer containing page number and section title.

visual_matchers.pattern: Content contained within a light-blue rectangular background.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Instructor-facing instructional content or discussion guide.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: not present; assume standard LaTeX $...$ for inline
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numbered list with varied styles including web URLs and book titles.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and 'Instructor Resources' text at the bottom margin.
